summary: SDM REWARDS system rebuild - full e2e testing. Fixed critical backend issues (error handler, MongoDB duplicate key). All 18 backend API tests pass. All frontend pages load correctly and core flows work.

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: HTTPException handler returning dict instead of JSONResponse causing 'dict object is not callable' error
fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Updated /app/backend/server.py to return JSONResponse in exception handler

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: MongoDB duplicate key error on email field when email is null
fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: 1) Dropped and recreated email index with sparse=True, 2) Modified auth.py to exclude null email from document before insert, 3) Updated existing records to unset null email fields
Applied same fix to client registration

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding try-catch around MongoDB index creation in server.py startup
MongoDB sparse index only works when field is absent, not when field is null - documented in code now
seed_data_creation: Created test client and test merchant during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: System rebuild complete. All auth flows work (client, merchant, admin). OTP is in TEST MODE - use code 123456. MongoDB email index fixed to be sparse. All dashboards functional.

mocked_apis.OTP_SMS: BulkClix SMS integration is MOCKED. OTP returns TEST_ request_id and accepts code 123456 for verification.

features_tested.Client auth - registration: ✅ OTP flow works with test code 123456
features_tested.Admin dashboard: ✅ Overview, clients list, merchants list, settings
